enterprise.name: Acme Tech Solutions
enterprise.description: A fictional mid-size technology consulting firm specializing in cloud migration, AI solutions, and enterprise digital transformation in the Greater China market.
enterprise.description_zh: 一家虚构的中型科技咨询公司，专注于大中华区的云迁移、AI 解决方案和企业数字化转型

description: 极客方舟科技 L3 企业定制 ontology — 示例虚拟企业，演示 L3 层的完整创建流程
description_en: Acme Tech Solutions L3 enterprise ontology — sample virtual enterprise demonstrating the full L3 creation workflow

classes.definition: 按技术领域划分的事业部，如云计算、人工智能、数据工程等
classes.definition_en: A division organized by technology domain, such as cloud computing, AI, and data engineering

classes.definition: 负责为客户设计端到端技术解决方案的跨领域架构团队
classes.definition_en: A cross-domain architecture team responsible for designing end-to-end technology solutions for clients

classes.definition: 帮助客户将传统 IT 基础设施迁移到公有云、私有云或混合云的咨询项目
classes.definition_en: A consulting engagement helping clients migrate traditional IT infrastructure to public, private, or hybrid cloud

classes.definition: 为客户构建企业级 AI/ML 平台，包含数据湖、模型训练和推理服务的全栈建设
classes.definition_en: Building enterprise AI/ML platforms for clients, including data lake, model training, and inference services

classes.definition: 帮助客户建立数据标准、数据质量管理和数据资产目录的治理咨询项目
classes.definition_en: A governance consulting engagement helping clients establish data standards, data quality management, and data asset catalogs

classes.definition: 帮助客户构建安全左移的 DevSecOps 流水线和工程文化
classes.definition_en: Helping clients build shift-left DevSecOps pipelines and engineering culture

classes.definition: 负责技术方案设计、架构评审和技术选型的高级技术角色
classes.definition_en: A senior technical role responsible for solution design, architecture review, and technology selection

classes.definition: 在项目中负责技术团队管理和技术交付质量的角色
classes.definition_en: A role responsible for technical team management and technical delivery quality within an engagement

classes.definition: 负责数据管道、ETL 和数据平台建设的技术角色
classes.definition_en: A technical role responsible for data pipelines, ETL, and data platform construction

classes.definition: 负责云架构设计、IaC 和云原生应用部署的技术角色
classes.definition_en: A technical role responsible for cloud architecture, IaC, and cloud-native application deployment

classes.definition: 公司自研的可复用技术组件、代码模板和自动化脚本，用于加速项目交付
classes.definition_en: Proprietary reusable technical components, code templates, and automation scripts for accelerating delivery

classes.definition: 公司定期发布的技术趋势评估报告，评估新兴技术的采纳建议
classes.definition_en: A periodic technology trend assessment report evaluating adoption recommendations for emerging technologies

classes.definition: 对客户现有 IT 环境的云迁移就绪度进行全面评估的交付物
classes.definition_en: A comprehensive assessment deliverable evaluating the client's existing IT environment for cloud migration readiness

classes.definition: 目标架构的详细设计文档，包含系统拓扑、集成模式和技术选型
classes.definition_en: A detailed design document for the target architecture, including system topology, integration patterns, and technology selection

classes.definition: 规范云资源使用和成本控制的内部治理策略，包括 RI 购买、Spot 实例和闲置资源清理
classes.definition_en: Internal governance policy for cloud resource usage and cost control, including RI purchases, Spot instances, and idle resource cleanup

classes.definition: 规范项目中开源软件使用、许可证审核和安全漏洞管理的合规策略
classes.definition_en: Compliance policy governing open-source software usage, license auditing, and security vulnerability management in projects

classes.definition: 过度依赖单一云厂商或技术供应商导致的迁移和谈判风险
classes.definition_en: Migration and negotiation risks from over-dependence on a single cloud vendor or technology supplier

classes.definition: 项目交付过程中因权限配置、数据传输不当导致的客户数据泄露风险
classes.definition_en: Risk of client data leakage due to improper permission configuration or data transmission during engagement delivery

classes.definition: 评估、规划和执行大规模云迁移的组织能力
classes.definition_en: Organizational capability to assess, plan, and execute large-scale cloud migrations

classes.definition: 端到端机器学习运维能力，涵盖模型训练、部署、监控和迭代
classes.definition_en: End-to-end machine learning operations capability covering model training, deployment, monitoring, and iteration

classes.definition: 技术顾问获取云厂商和技术认证的年度完成率
classes.definition_en: Annual completion rate for technical consultants obtaining cloud vendor and technology certifications

classes.definition: 项目交付代码的质量指标，包含测试覆盖率、静态分析评分和技术债务比率
classes.definition_en: Quality metrics for delivered code, including test coverage, static analysis scores, and technical debt ratio

classes.definition: 云迁移项目中应用和数据成功迁移的比例
classes.definition_en: Percentage of applications and data successfully migrated in cloud migration engagements

classes.definition: 鼓励顾问撰写技术博客文章进行知识分享和个人品牌建设的内部流程
classes.definition_en: Internal program encouraging consultants to write technical blog posts for knowledge sharing and personal branding

classes.definition: 顾问申请、学习、考试和报销技术认证的标准化流程
classes.definition_en: Standardized process for consultants to apply, study, take exams, and get reimbursed for technical certifications

classes.definition: 对项目技术方案进行评审和把关的内部委员会，确保方案符合最佳实践
classes.definition_en: Internal committee reviewing and gatekeeping project technical solutions to ensure alignment with best practices

relations.definition: 公司设有按技术方向划分的事业部
解决方案架构师为项目设计技术方案
relations.definition_en: A solution architect designs technical solutions for an engagement

relations.definition: 项目产出架构蓝图交付物
relations.definition_en: An engagement produces an architecture blueprint deliverable

relations.definition: 云迁移项目起始阶段须经云就绪评估
relations.definition_en: Cloud migration engagements begin with a cloud readiness assessment

relations.label_zh: 经架构评审委员会审核
relations.definition: 架构蓝图须经架构评审委员会审核通过
relations.definition_en: Architecture blueprints must be reviewed and approved by the Architecture Review Board

relations.definition: 项目使用技术加速器加速交付
relations.definition_en: An engagement uses technical accelerators to speed up delivery

relations.definition: 顾问通过技术认证流程获取资质
relations.definition_en: Consultants obtain qualifications through the technical certification process

relations.definition: 技术事业部定期发布技术雷达报告
relations.definition_en: Technology divisions periodically publish tech radar reports

relations.definition: 项目须遵守开源合规策略
relations.definition_en: Engagements must comply with the open source compliance policy

relations.definition: 云迁移项目成效由迁移成功率 KPI 衡量
relations.definition_en: Cloud migration engagement effectiveness is measured by migration success rate KPI

metadata.author: Enterprise Architecture Team (Sample)
metadata.changelog: v1.0.0: Initial L3 sample ontology for virtual enterprise, demonstrating full workflow
metadata.note: This is a FICTIONAL enterprise created for demonstration purposes. All company names, engagement names, and data are entirely fictitious.
